title: Arcadia - Reverie Edition
description: A Remarkably Expanded World Explore a vibrant world with amplified dimensions, new biomes, wildlife, dungeons, creative decoration, and lightweight tech. All optimized for smooth performance.
body:
![AAAAAA](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d8a71542be8a7e28d28c8ac190056474a385c748.png)
### Welcome to Arcadia
A carefully curated modpack that blends optimized performance with rich exploration, adventure, building, and social interaction!
#
# ✨ What to Expect:

🌋 Amplified and Reimagined Worlds
Explore dramatic and immersive environments with **Amplified Nether**, **Better Nether**, and **Better End.**
The Overworld becomes even more vibrant with **Oh The Biomes We've Gone** and **Naturalist**, adding new biomes and wildlife.

⚔️ Enhanced Gameplay
Upgrade your gear with **Advanced Netherite**.
Speed up your mining with **Vein Mining**, and enjoy expanded cooking systems from **Farmer’s Delight Refabricated**.
Discover new dungeons and structures via **Dungeons and Taverns**, and track your adventures with **Scout**.

🧱 Creative Building & Decoration
Transform your base with **Chisel Reborn**, **Another Furniture**, and **Supplementaries**.
Add comfort and charm with **Simple Hats**, **Sit**, and **Comforts** mods.

🎮 Quality of Life Improvements
Easily browse recipes and effects with **JEI** and **Enchantment Descriptions.**
Enhance your HUD with **AppleSkin**, **BetterF3**, **Mouse Tweaks**, **Chat Heads**, **Not Enough Animations**, and **Better Clouds**.

🗺️ Mapping and Fast Travel
Never get lost with **Xaero’s Minimap**, and teleport quickly using **Waystones**.

💀 Death with Less Frustration
Thanks to **Keep Some Inventory**, you'll keep part of your items when you die. Less rage, more fun!

🎤 Real-Time Voice Chat
Talk to your friends in-game with **Simple Voice Chat** for an immersive multiplayer experience.

🐟 Vibrant Ocean Exploration
Dive into lively underwater biomes with **Hybrid Aquatic**.

✈️ Light Tech & Fun Travel
Soar through the skies with **Immersive Aircraft**!

🧩 All of this without sacrificing lightweight performance, perfect for players with lower-end PCs who still want a rich modded experience.
> Join now and explore, build, and adventure with friends in the world of Arcadia!
